nasb.text: Now during the day He was teaching in the temple, but at evening He would go out and spend the night on the mount that is called Olivet.

esv.text: And every day he was teaching in the temple, but at night he went out and lodged on the mount called Olivet.

cnv.text: 耶穌白天在殿裡教導人，晚上就到橄欖山上去過夜。

ccb.text: 耶稣每天在圣殿里讲道，晚上则到城外的橄榄山上过夜。

csbs.text: 耶稣白天在圣殿里教导人，夜间出去到那叫做“橄榄园”的山里过夜。
